snippet.title: Mavo – Tumo Weto (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Tumo Weto is one of the standout records from Mavo’s debut album, Ukanigbe — a song deeply loved by longtime listeners and new fans alike.

In this music video, Mavo revisits the story of a love that once felt pure but slowly turned sour. Through aching melodies and honest reflection, he narrates the unraveling of intimacy, trust, and unspoken promises.

Starring Funmbi Toye, the video captures the quiet tension and emotional distance between two people holding on to memories while drifting apart.

Rooted in Ukanigbe’s themes of vulnerability and self-reflection, Tumo Weto remains timeless — a reminder that some feelings never truly fade.

Produced by Aymix Beats ( Manna Tomusilo) 
Directed by BadmanTej

Marketed & distributed by KRL.

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 11 (2026) - Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Cristiano Ronaldo | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #CristianoRonaldo

Watch This Fast & Furious 11 Fan Made Concept Trailer (2026)

Dom Toretto (played by Vin Diesel) will race towards one of the most explosive finales of all time for the Fast & Furious franchise. He also introduces the most unlikely member of the family: Cristiano Ronaldo (making his acting debut) plays Marco Santos; he was once a Portuguese street racing legend, and now an international smuggler. Ronaldo’s history with Dom is going to create some serious issues that no one could have ever imagined. Ronaldo brings natural athletic charm to Marco, whose quickness and agility on the streets are similar to those of a professional soccer player. His competitive nature to be the best and always win makes him both a valuable ally to Dom, and a potential liability, since when his ego clashes with Dom's family first philosophy he is a potential problem to be solved.

Dwayne Johnson returns as Luke Hobbs to round out the three alpha personality figures that make up the trio that represents humanity's last hope to save itself from a threat that has studied each of them individually. What makes this casting choice so genius is the meta-textual aspect of it; a real world sports legend enters a fictional universe, and has to follow the same unrealistic physics that governs every other character in this franchise.

The action scenes reach absolutely insane heights with set pieces that display Ronaldo's actual athletic ability, combined with the typical franchise mayhem and destruction; imagine the franchise's classic vehicle stunts, combined with a character that can actually run fast, and perform physically impressive feats that blur the line between a sports highlight reel and an action movie.

You'll see Dom struggle with mixed emotions towards Marco, as Marco's loyalty is strong, but as Marco uses many of the same tactics that Dom tried to leave behind in order to protect his family, Dom finds himself drawn back to those tactics when his family is threatened. Johnson brings authoritative leadership, while Ronaldo's competitive nature creates tension within the team, where everyone is used to being the "best" in whatever they do. The film strikes a perfect balance between spectacular vehicular destruction and emotionally charged themes regarding legacy and what you leave behind, while honoring the franchises' core theme of how chosen family can transcend blood ties when you've bled for each other in multiple, impossible situations.

Expect globe-trotting action scenes throughout various European cities to show off Ronaldo's hometown, practical stunts that will test the physical limits of the actors, and a fitting sendoff for two decades worth of absurd thrills and fun, with a genuine heart to it.

Disclaimer:
This is an unofficial fan-made concept trailer created solely for artistic and entertainment purposes. It is not affiliated with nor sponsored by Universal Pictures or any of the official rights holders to the Fast & Furious franchise. This video uses AI generated visual effects and editing techniques to conceptualize what a hypothetical eleventh installment would look like.
